caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses is performing music in an indoor setting. He wears a white collared shirt under a dark vest featuring decorative white and red embroidery. He is positioned behind a microphone on a stand and is playing an acoustic guitar. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are visible. The background consists of light-colored horizontal blinds. The text "ORCA" appears in white uppercase letters in the lower right area of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone and strumming his guitar, with subtle changes in his facial expression and posture as he performs.
